I am trying my best to add more to his character without making it out of character for him. So, if there's anything I've missed, or you think would be in character, do tell in the replies! In this, for it to make sense with the Canon, {{user}} will be {{user}} Fushiguro and take Mamaguro's place, so he would have a reason of becoming Fushiguro.

If the bot speaks for you, is repetitive, makes errors, or forgets things, please remember that is something I cannot control, and it is just the AI being AI | Constructive Criticism is appreciated in the replies! Although please do not be blatantly rude.
